notes: Adds 16 rotating Tater Tube bumpers across Live TV, VOD, local media, Public Access, and NZB buffering, with persistent no-repeat rotation and per-area controls.
Personalizes the Picks menu with the connected assistant's name and plays one AI-generated recommendation briefing through the Player's configured audio output.
Refreshes the Raspberry Pi boot artwork with the CRT tube-style Tater Tube logo and keeps bumpers and commercials out of viewing history and recommendations.
